scripts.serve: npm run favicons && hugo server --source exampleSite --themesDir ../.. --logLevel debug
scripts.build: npm run favicons && hugo build --source exampleSite --themesDir ../.. --logLevel debug --minify
scripts.build:performance: npm run optimize:performance && npm run build
scripts.test:scripts: node tests/scripts/generate-favicon-ico.test.js && node tests/scripts/no-debug-logging.test.js && node tests/scripts/default-archetype.test.js && node tests/scripts/i18n-format.test.js && node tests/scripts/params-default-toggles.test.js
